```{=html}
<script>
window.WAS_TITLE_PRE = 'filter(when_any(';
window.WAS_CONDS = [
  { text: 'species == "Adelie"', color: '#4a86c5' },
  { text: 'body_mass_g > 5000', color: '#e8853a' }
];
window.WAS_TITLE_POST = '))';
window.WAS_DATA = [
  ['Adelie', 'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie', 'Dream', '3800'],
  ['Gentoo', 'Biscoe', '4750'],
  ['Gentoo', 'Dream', '5200'],
  ['Chinstrap', 'Dream', '3733']
];
window.WAS_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
window.WAS_MATCHES = [
  [true, true, false, false, false],   // species == "Adelie"
  [false, false, false, true, false]   // body_mass_g > 5000
];
</script>
```

<div id="was-stage"></div>

[]{.fragment .was-frag id="was-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .was-frag id="was-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .was-frag id="was-result"}
